name: Nihil
rules_text: H:2 A:1 HP:7 L:2 Cast on friendly, unoccupied town or colony. Creates Nihil, a Shadow Hero swordsman. Cannot join groups or add recruits. When hit by a minion for 1 or more damage (before checking armor), the attacking minion gets Nihil's Curse (cumulative, -3 hand and missile damage, regains +1 damage per turn for 3 turns). (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)
